headline: Is Allegion (ALLE) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness And DCF Upside Estimate
summary: If you are wondering whether Allegion's current share price still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in, this article breaks down what the numbers actually say. Allegion recently closed at US$130.43, with the stock edging up 1.5% over the past week, falling 10.7% over the past month, down 18.9% year to date, and down 6.4% over the last year. It is still sitting 27.3% higher over three years and is roughly flat over five years. Recent coverage has focused on how...
